user.title: Closest Intent
user.description: Fuzzy-match STT output against your conversation intents and forward the canonical sentence to hassil. A fallback conversation agent can be configured for when hassil can't handle the result.

data.denylist: Exclude these intent names from matching (empty = none excluded)
data.slot_extraction: Extract slot values from user speech
data.include_builtins: Also fuzzy-match Home Assistant's built-in intents (HassTurnOn etc.). Not recommended
data.fallback_agent: Fallback conversation agent (used only when hassil errors or returns no match)

init.title: Closest Intent options
init.description: Tweak any setting live. If you originally configured via YAML, options set here override YAML on a per-key basis.

data.denylist: Exclude these intent names from matching (empty = none excluded)
data.slot_extraction: Extract slot values from user speech
data.include_builtins: Also fuzzy-match Home Assistant's built-in intents (HassTurnOn etc.). Not recommended
data.fallback_agent: Fallback conversation agent (used only when hassil errors or returns no match)

dump_candidates.name: Dump candidates
dump_candidates.description: Log the current candidate pool, expansion rules, and slot lists for every loaded Closest Intent agent.

parse_sentence.name: Parse sentence
parse_sentence.description: Run a sentence through the Closest Intent matcher and return what it would match.

language.name: Language
language.description: If none selected, use HomeAssistant's configured default language.

entry_id.name: Entry ID
entry_id.description: If none selected, use first configured one.

run_official.name: Also run Home Assistant's parser
run_official.description: Whether to pass the parsed/canonicalized sentence to HomeAssistant's own parser. Does not execute the intent/action.
